name: remote-connector
description: Prepare a remote SSH host for Codex desktop connections.

interface.shortDescription: Install and log in Codex on a remote SSH host.
interface.longDescription: Remote Connector verifies an SSH alias, copies the bundled Codex install script to the remote machine, runs it, opens a reverse proxy tunnel, starts device authentication, and prints the Codex desktop connection details.
defaultPrompt: Connect Codex to my SSH host dev-box
